translations.literal: The emperor approved and ordered high ministers to discuss: "Common shrines have drumming, dance, and music; if suburban sacrifice has no music, how is it fitting?"
translations.idiomatic: The emperor approved and ordered high ministers to discuss: "Common shrines have drumming, dance, and music; if suburban sacrifice has no music, how is it fitting?"

sentences.zh: 公卿曰：「古者祠天地皆有樂，而神祇可得而禮。」

translations.literal: The ministers said: "In antiquity sacrifices to Heaven and Earth all had music, and only then could gods properly be honored."
translations.idiomatic: The ministers said: "In antiquity sacrifices to Heaven and Earth all had music, and only then could gods properly be honored."

sentences.zh: 或曰：「泰帝使素女鼓五十絃瑟，悲，帝禁不止，故破其瑟為二十五絃。」

translations.literal: Some said: "The Great Thearch once had Su Nu play a fifty-string zither; it was too mournful, and though the Thearch forbade it, it did not stop, so he split the zither into twenty-five strings."
translations.idiomatic: Some said: "The Great Thearch once had Su Nu play a fifty-string zither; it was too mournful, and though the Thearch forbade it, it did not stop, so he split the zither into twenty-five strings."

sentences.zh: 於是塞南越，禱祠泰一、后土，始用樂舞。

translations.literal: So after pacifying Nanyue, in prayers to Taiyi and Houtu they first began to use ritual music and dance.
translations.idiomatic: So after pacifying Nanyue, in prayers to Taiyi and Houtu they first began to use ritual music and dance.

sentences.zh: 益召歌兒，作二十五絃及空侯瑟自此起。

translations.literal: More singers were recruited, and twenty-five-string zithers and konghou harps arose from this time.
translations.idiomatic: More singers were recruited, and twenty-five-string zithers and konghou harps arose from this time.

sentences.zh: 其來年冬，上議曰：「古者先振兵釋旅，然後封禪。」

translations.literal: In the following winter, the emperor discussed: "In antiquity one first mobilized troops and then disbanded them, and only afterward performed Feng and Shan rites."
translations.idiomatic: In the following winter, the emperor discussed: "In antiquity one first mobilized troops and then disbanded them, and only afterward performed Feng and Shan rites."

sentences.zh: 乃遂北巡朔方，勒兵十餘萬騎，還祭黃帝冢橋山，釋兵敘如。

translations.literal: So he inspected north to Shuofang, reviewed over one hundred thousand cavalry, returned to sacrifice at the Yellow Thearch's mound at Qiaoshan, and then disbanded troops in order.
translations.idiomatic: So he inspected north to Shuofang, reviewed over one hundred thousand cavalry, returned to sacrifice at the Yellow Thearch's mound at Qiaoshan, and then disbanded troops in order.

sentences.zh: 上曰：「

translations.literal: The emperor said:
translations.idiomatic: The emperor said:

sentences.zh: 吾聞黃帝不死，有冢，何也？」

translations.literal: "I have heard the Yellow Thearch did not die; why then is there a mound?"
translations.idiomatic: "I have heard the Yellow Thearch did not die; why then is there a mound?"

sentences.zh: 或對曰：「黃帝以僊上天，群臣葬其衣冠。」

translations.literal: Someone answered: "The Yellow Thearch ascended to Heaven as a transcendent; his ministers buried his robes and cap."
translations.idiomatic: Someone answered: "The Yellow Thearch ascended to Heaven as a transcendent; his ministers buried his robes and cap."

sentences.zh: 既至甘泉，為且用事泰山，先類祠泰一。

translations.literal: After reaching Ganquan, because he was about to conduct rites at Mount Tai, he first performed the lei-class sacrifice to Taiyi.
translations.idiomatic: After reaching Ganquan, because he was about to conduct rites at Mount Tai, he first performed the lei-class sacrifice to Taiyi.

sentences.zh: 自得寶鼎，上與公卿諸生議封禪。

translations.literal: Since obtaining the precious tripod, the emperor had discussed Feng and Shan with ministers and scholars.
translations.idiomatic: Since obtaining the precious tripod, the emperor had discussed Feng and Shan with ministers and scholars.

sentences.zh: 封禪用希曠絕，莫知其儀體，而群儒采封禪尚書、周官、王制之望祀射牛事。

translations.literal: Because the rites were rare and extraordinary and no one knew their exact form, Confucian scholars compiled material from documents on Feng and Shan, the Shangshu, Zhou offices, royal regulations, and the ox-shooting rite of distant sacrifice.
translations.idiomatic: Because the rites were rare and extraordinary and no one knew their exact form, Confucian scholars compiled material from documents on Feng and Shan, the Shangshu, Zhou offices, royal regulations, and the ox-shooting rite of distant sacrifice.

sentences.zh: 齊人丁公年九十餘，曰：「封禪者，古不死之名也。

translations.literal: A man of Qi, Ding Gong, over ninety years old, said: "Feng and Shan is the ancient name of immortal ascent.
translations.idiomatic: A man of Qi, Ding Gong, over ninety years old, said: "Feng and Shan is the ancient name of immortal ascent.

sentences.zh: 秦皇帝不得上封。

translations.literal: The Qin Emperor never succeeded in ascending for Feng.
translations.idiomatic: The Qin Emperor never succeeded in ascending for Feng.

sentences.zh: 陛下必欲上，稍上即無風雨，遂上封矣。」

translations.literal: If Your Majesty truly wishes to ascend, then ascend gradually; if there is no wind or rain, you may complete Feng."
translations.idiomatic: If Your Majesty truly wishes to ascend, then ascend gradually; if there is no wind or rain, you may complete Feng."

sentences.zh: 上於是乃令諸儒習射牛，草封禪儀。

translations.literal: So the emperor ordered Confucians to practice shooting oxen and draft the Feng and Shan ritual.
translations.idiomatic: So the emperor ordered Confucians to practice shooting oxen and draft the Feng and Shan ritual.

sentences.zh: 數年，至且行。

translations.literal: After several years, it came near to execution.
translations.idiomatic: After several years, it came near to execution.

sentences.zh: 天子既聞公孫卿及方士之言，黃帝以上封禪皆致怪物與神通，欲放黃帝以接神人蓬萊，高世比德於九皇，而頗采儒術以文之。

translations.literal: After hearing Gongsun Qing and the fangshi claim that from the Yellow Thearch onward those who performed Feng and Shan obtained strange creatures and communicated with spirits, the emperor wished to emulate the Yellow Thearch, connect with spirit beings of Penglai, transcend his age, and match the virtue of the Nine Augusts, while also adopting some Confucian forms to ornament the rite.
translations.idiomatic: After hearing Gongsun Qing and the fangshi claim that from the Yellow Thearch onward those who performed Feng and Shan obtained strange creatures and communicated with spirits, the emperor wished to emulate the Yellow Thearch, connect with spirit beings of Penglai, transcend his age, and match the virtue of the Nine Augusts, while also adopting some Confucian forms to ornament the rite.

sentences.zh: 群儒既已不能辯明封禪事，又拘於詩書古文而不敢騁。

translations.literal: The scholars could neither clearly explain Feng and Shan nor break free from constraints of Odes, Documents, and archaic texts.
translations.idiomatic: The scholars could neither clearly explain Feng and Shan nor break free from constraints of Odes, Documents, and archaic texts.

sentences.zh: 上為封祠器視群儒，群儒或曰「不與古同」，徐偃又曰「太常諸生行禮不如魯善」，周霸屬圖封事，於是上黜偃、霸，而盡罷諸儒弗用。

translations.literal: The emperor showed ritual vessels for Feng sacrifice to the scholars; some said "not the same as antiquity," Xu Yan said "the ritual practice of Grand Ceremonial students is not as good as Lu's," and Zhou Ba submitted plans for Feng affairs. The emperor then dismissed Yan and Ba and entirely set aside the scholars.
translations.idiomatic: The emperor showed ritual vessels for Feng sacrifice to the scholars; some said "not the same as antiquity," Xu Yan said "the ritual practice of Grand Ceremonial students is not as good as Lu's," and Zhou Ba submitted plans for Feng affairs. The emperor then dismissed Yan and Ba and entirely set aside the scholars.

sentences.zh: 三月，乃東幸緱氏，禮登中嶽太室。

translations.literal: In the third month, he went east to Goushi and ritually ascended Taishi of the Central Peak.
translations.idiomatic: In the third month, he went east to Goushi and ritually ascended Taishi of the Central Peak.

sentences.zh: 從官在山上聞若有言「萬歲」云。

translations.literal: Attendants on the mountain heard as if a voice said "Ten thousand years!"
translations.idiomatic: Attendants on the mountain heard as if a voice said "Ten thousand years!"

sentences.zh: 問上，上不言；

translations.literal: They asked above; those above said nothing.
translations.idiomatic: They asked above; those above said nothing.

sentences.zh: 問下，下不言。

translations.literal: They asked below; those below said nothing.
translations.idiomatic: They asked below; those below said nothing.

sentences.zh: 乃令祠官加增太室祠，禁毋伐其山木，以山下戶凡三百封镯高，為之奉邑，獨給祠，復無有所與。

translations.literal: So he ordered sacrificial officers to expand the Taishi shrine, forbade cutting mountain timber, and granted three hundred households below the mountain as a dedicated support fief solely for the shrine, exempt from other obligations.
translations.idiomatic: So he ordered sacrificial officers to expand the Taishi shrine, forbade cutting mountain timber, and granted three hundred households below the mountain as a dedicated support fief solely for the shrine, exempt from other obligations.

sentences.zh: 上因東上泰山，泰山草木未生，乃令人上石立之泰山顛。

translations.literal: The emperor then continued east up Mount Tai; as grasses and trees had not yet sprouted, he had people erect a stone marker at the summit.
translations.idiomatic: The emperor then continued east up Mount Tai; as grasses and trees had not yet sprouted, he had people erect a stone marker at the summit.

sentences.zh: 上遂東巡海上，行禮祠八神。

translations.literal: He then toured east along the sea and performed rites to the Eight Spirits.
translations.idiomatic: He then toured east along the sea and performed rites to the Eight Spirits.

sentences.zh: 齊人之上疏言神怪奇方者以萬數，乃益發船，令言海中神山者數千人求蓬萊神人。

translations.literal: Memorials from Qi men about strange divine techniques came in by the tens of thousands; he further dispatched ships and ordered several thousand who claimed knowledge of sea spirit mountains to seek Penglai immortals.
translations.idiomatic: Memorials from Qi men about strange divine techniques came in by the tens of thousands; he further dispatched ships and ordered several thousand who claimed knowledge of sea spirit mountains to seek Penglai immortals.

sentences.zh: 公孫卿持節常先行候名山，至東萊，言夜見大人，長數丈，就之則不見，見其跡甚大，類禽獸云。

translations.literal: Gongsun Qing, bearing tally, routinely went ahead to scout famous mountains. Reaching Donglai, he said he saw at night a giant person several zhang tall; when approached it vanished, but its tracks were very large, like those of beasts.
translations.idiomatic: Gongsun Qing, bearing tally, routinely went ahead to scout famous mountains. Reaching Donglai, he said he saw at night a giant person several zhang tall; when approached it vanished, but its tracks were very large, like those of beasts.

sentences.zh: 群臣有言見一老父牽狗，言「吾欲見鉅公」，已忽不見。

translations.literal: Some officials said they saw an old man leading a dog, saying "I wish to see the great lord," and then suddenly disappearing.
translations.idiomatic: Some officials said they saw an old man leading a dog, saying "I wish to see the great lord," and then suddenly disappearing.

sentences.zh: 上既見大跡，未信，及群臣又言老父，則大以為僊人也。

translations.literal: After the emperor saw the great tracks he still doubted; but when officials also reported the old man, he greatly took it to be an immortal.
translations.idiomatic: After the emperor saw the great tracks he still doubted; but when officials also reported the old man, he greatly took it to be an immortal.

sentences.zh: 宿留海上，與方士傳車及間使求神僊人以千數。

translations.literal: He stayed for a time on the coast, dispatching relay carriages and covert envoys by the thousands to seek spirit immortals with the fangshi.
translations.idiomatic: He stayed for a time on the coast, dispatching relay carriages and covert envoys by the thousands to seek spirit immortals with the fangshi.

sentences.zh: 四月，還至奉高。

translations.literal: In the fourth month, he returned to Fenggao.
translations.idiomatic: In the fourth month, he returned to Fenggao.

sentences.zh: 上念諸儒及方士言封禪人殊，不經，難施行。

translations.literal: The emperor reflected that what scholars and fangshi said about Feng and Shan differed widely, was uncanonical, and hard to implement.
translations.idiomatic: The emperor reflected that what scholars and fangshi said about Feng and Shan differed widely, was uncanonical, and hard to implement.

sentences.zh: 天子至梁父，禮祠地主。

translations.literal: When the Son of Heaven reached Liangfu, he ritually sacrificed to the Earth Lord.
translations.idiomatic: When the Son of Heaven reached Liangfu, he ritually sacrificed to the Earth Lord.

sentences.zh: 至乙卯，令侍中儒者皮弁縉紳，射牛行事。

translations.literal: On the yi-mao day he ordered Confucian attendants in ritual caps and girdles to perform the ox-shooting rites.
translations.idiomatic: On the yi-mao day he ordered Confucian attendants in ritual caps and girdles to perform the ox-shooting rites.

sentences.zh: 封泰山下東方，如郊祠泰一之禮。

translations.literal: The Feng rite was performed east below Mount Tai, according to the suburban-Taiyi model.
translations.idiomatic: The Feng rite was performed east below Mount Tai, according to the suburban-Taiyi model.

sentences.zh: 封廣丈二尺，高九尺，其下則有玉牒書，書祕。

translations.literal: The sealed mound was one zhang two chi wide and nine chi high; beneath it was a jade-codex inscription, kept secret.
translations.idiomatic: The sealed mound was one zhang two chi wide and nine chi high; beneath it was a jade-codex inscription, kept secret.

sentences.zh: 禮畢，天子獨與侍中奉車子侯上泰山，亦有封。

translations.literal: After rites were complete, the Son of Heaven alone, with the imperial carriage attendant Marquis Zihou, ascended Mount Tai and also performed a sealing rite.
translations.idiomatic: After rites were complete, the Son of Heaven alone, with the imperial carriage attendant Marquis Zihou, ascended Mount Tai and also performed a sealing rite.

sentences.zh: 其事皆禁。

translations.literal: All details were kept under prohibition.
translations.idiomatic: All details were kept under prohibition.

sentences.zh: 明日，下陰道。

translations.literal: The next day he descended by the shaded route.
translations.idiomatic: The next day he descended by the shaded route.

sentences.zh: 丙辰，禪泰山下阯東北肅然山，如祭后土禮。

translations.literal: On bing-chen day, he performed the Shan rite at Suran Mountain northeast below Mount Tai's base, following the Houtu ritual model.
translations.idiomatic: On bing-chen day, he performed the Shan rite at Suran Mountain northeast below Mount Tai's base, following the Houtu ritual model.

sentences.zh: 天子皆親拜見，衣上黃而盡用樂焉。

translations.literal: The Son of Heaven personally bowed in all audiences, wore upper yellow garments, and used full music.
translations.idiomatic: The Son of Heaven personally bowed in all audiences, wore upper yellow garments, and used full music.

sentences.zh: 江淮間一茅三脊為神藉。

translations.literal: Triple-ridged thatch from the Jiang-Huai region was used as the divine mat.
translations.idiomatic: Triple-ridged thatch from the Jiang-Huai region was used as the divine mat.

sentences.zh: 五色土益雜封。

translations.literal: Five-colored soils were further mixed into the seal.
translations.idiomatic: Five-colored soils were further mixed into the seal.

sentences.zh: 縱遠方奇獸飛禽及白雉諸物，頗以加祠。

translations.literal: Rare beasts, flying birds, white pheasants, and similar offerings from distant regions were released and added to the rite.
translations.idiomatic: Rare beasts, flying birds, white pheasants, and similar offerings from distant regions were released and added to the rite.

sentences.zh: 兕牛象犀之屬不用。

translations.literal: Creatures such as rhinoceros-ox, elephant, and rhinoceros were not used.
translations.idiomatic: Creatures such as rhinoceros-ox, elephant, and rhinoceros were not used.

sentences.zh: 皆至泰山，然後去。

translations.literal: All were brought to Mount Tai and then released.
translations.idiomatic: All were brought to Mount Tai and then released.

sentences.zh: 封禪祠，其夜若有光，晝有白雲出封中。

translations.literal: On the night of Feng-Shan sacrifice there seemed to be light; by day white clouds emerged from within the sealed mound.
translations.idiomatic: On the night of Feng-Shan sacrifice there seemed to be light; by day white clouds emerged from within the sealed mound.

sentences.zh: 天子從禪還，坐明堂，群臣更上壽。

translations.literal: After returning from the Shan rite, the Son of Heaven sat in the Mingtang and ministers offered renewed felicitations.
translations.idiomatic: After returning from the Shan rite, the Son of Heaven sat in the Mingtang and ministers offered renewed felicitations.

sentences.zh: 下詔改元為元封。

translations.literal: An edict changed the era name to Yuanfeng.
translations.idiomatic: An edict changed the era name to Yuanfeng.

sentences.zh: 語在武紀。

translations.literal: This is recorded in the Annals of Emperor Wu.
translations.idiomatic: This is recorded in the Annals of Emperor Wu.

sentences.zh: 又曰：「古者天子五載一巡狩，用事泰山，諸侯有朝宿地。

translations.literal: Another edict said: "In antiquity the Son of Heaven inspected every five years and conducted rites at Mount Tai; feudal lords had lodging grounds for court attendance.
translations.idiomatic: Another edict said: "In antiquity the Son of Heaven inspected every five years and conducted rites at Mount Tai; feudal lords had lodging grounds for court attendance.

sentences.zh: 其令諸侯各治邸泰山下。」

translations.literal: Let all feudal lords each establish residences below Mount Tai."
translations.idiomatic: Let all feudal lords each establish residences below Mount Tai."

sentences.zh: 天子既已封泰山，無風雨，而方士更言蓬萊諸神若將可得，於是上欣然庶幾遇之，復東至海上望焉。

translations.literal: After the Son of Heaven had sealed Mount Tai and encountered no wind or rain, fangshi further said the gods of Penglai were nearly obtainable. The emperor, delighted and hopeful of meeting them, again went east to gaze at the sea.
translations.idiomatic: After the Son of Heaven had sealed Mount Tai and encountered no wind or rain, fangshi further said the gods of Penglai were nearly obtainable. The emperor, delighted and hopeful of meeting them, again went east to gaze at the sea.

sentences.zh: 奉車子侯暴病，一日死。

translations.literal: The carriage attendant Marquis Zihou suddenly fell gravely ill and died in a day.
translations.idiomatic: The carriage attendant Marquis Zihou suddenly fell gravely ill and died in a day.

sentences.zh: 上乃遂去，並海上，北至碣石，巡自遼西，歷北邊至九原。

translations.literal: The emperor then departed, traveling along the coast north to Jieshi, then touring from Liaoxi along the northern frontier to Jiuyuan.
translations.idiomatic: The emperor then departed, traveling along the coast north to Jieshi, then touring from Liaoxi along the northern frontier to Jiuyuan.

sentences.zh: 五月，乃至甘泉，周萬八千里云。

translations.literal: In the fifth month he finally reached Ganquan, said to have traveled eighteen thousand li.
translations.idiomatic: In the fifth month he finally reached Ganquan, said to have traveled eighteen thousand li.

sentences.zh: 其秋，有星孛於東井。

translations.literal: That autumn, a broom star appeared in Dongjing.
translations.idiomatic: That autumn, a broom star appeared in Dongjing.

sentences.zh: 後十餘日，有星孛於三能。

translations.literal: More than ten days later, a broom star appeared in San Tai.
translations.idiomatic: More than ten days later, a broom star appeared in San Tai.

sentences.zh: 望氣王朔言：「候獨見填星出如瓜，食頃，復入。」

translations.literal: Qi-observer Wang Shuo said: "I alone observed Saturn emerge like a melon, then after a short while re-enter."
translations.idiomatic: Qi-observer Wang Shuo said: "I alone observed Saturn emerge like a melon, then after a short while re-enter."

sentences.zh: 有司皆曰：「陛下建漢家封禪，天其報德星云。」

translations.literal: All officials said: "Your Majesty has established Han's Feng and Shan rites; Heaven now repays virtue with auspicious stars."
translations.idiomatic: All officials said: "Your Majesty has established Han's Feng and Shan rites; Heaven now repays virtue with auspicious stars."

sentences.zh: 其來年冬，郊雍五帝。

translations.literal: In the following winter, suburban sacrifice was held at Yong to the Five Thearchs.
translations.idiomatic: In the following winter, suburban sacrifice was held at Yong to the Five Thearchs.

sentences.zh: 還，拜祝祠泰一。

translations.literal: On return, he paid reverence and sacrificed to Taiyi.
translations.idiomatic: On return, he paid reverence and sacrificed to Taiyi.

sentences.zh: 贊饗曰：「德星昭衍，厥維休祥。

translations.literal: The hymn of offering said: "The virtue star shines and spreads; this indeed is auspicious blessing.
translations.idiomatic: The hymn of offering said: "The virtue star shines and spreads; this indeed is auspicious blessing.

sentences.zh: 壽星仍出，淵燿光明。

translations.literal: The Longevity Star appeared again, its deep radiance bright and clear.
translations.idiomatic: The Longevity Star appeared again, its deep radiance bright and clear.

sentences.zh: 信星昭見，皇帝敬拜泰祝之享。」

translations.literal: The trustworthy star shone plainly seen; the emperor reverently bowed at the offering proclaimed by the Grand Invocator.
translations.idiomatic: The trustworthy star shone plainly seen; the emperor reverently bowed at the offering proclaimed by the Grand Invocator.

sentences.zh: 其春，公孫卿言見神人東萊山，若云「欲見天子」。

translations.literal: That spring, Gongsun Qing said he had seen a spirit-man at Donglai Mountain, as if saying, 'I wish to see the Son of Heaven.'
translations.idiomatic: That spring, Gongsun Qing said he had seen a spirit-man at Donglai Mountain, as if saying, 'I wish to see the Son of Heaven.'

sentences.zh: 天子於是幸緱氏城，拜卿為中大夫。

translations.literal: The Son of Heaven then visited Goushi city and appointed Qing as Palace Grandee.
translations.idiomatic: The Son of Heaven then visited Goushi city and appointed Qing as Palace Grandee.

sentences.zh: 遂至東萊，宿，留之數日，毋所見，見大人跡云。

translations.literal: He then reached Donglai, stayed overnight and remained several days, saw nothing, but was told of giant tracks.
translations.idiomatic: He then reached Donglai, stayed overnight and remained several days, saw nothing, but was told of giant tracks.

sentences.zh: 復遣方士求神人采藥以千數。

translations.literal: He again dispatched fangshi by the thousands to seek spirit-men and gather medicines.
translations.idiomatic: He again dispatched fangshi by the thousands to seek spirit-men and gather medicines.

sentences.zh: 是歲旱。

translations.literal: That year there was drought.
translations.idiomatic: That year there was drought.

sentences.zh: 天子既出亡名，乃禱萬里沙，過祠泰山。

translations.literal: After the Son of Heaven had traveled under hidden names, he prayed at Wanli Sha and passed Mount Tai to sacrifice.
translations.idiomatic: After the Son of Heaven had traveled under hidden names, he prayed at Wanli Sha and passed Mount Tai to sacrifice.

sentences.zh: 還至瓠子，自臨塞決河，留二日，湛祠而去。

translations.literal: Returning to Huzi, he personally oversaw the closure of the breached river, remained two days, made deep offerings, and departed.
translations.idiomatic: Returning to Huzi, he personally oversaw the closure of the breached river, remained two days, made deep offerings, and departed.
